top_competing_hypotheses.thesis: Fed policy repricing was the primary driver, with oil weakness acting mainly through inflation expectations.
top_competing_hypotheses.why_it_fits: Best explains WTI, Treasury yields, and the inflation channel while remaining consistent with the stronger dollar and only partial equity participation.

top_competing_hypotheses.thesis: The session reflected a mixed macro repricing centered on duration/fiscal-supply repricing.
top_competing_hypotheses.weakness: Does not explain the full cross-asset pattern on its own.
top_competing_hypotheses.why_it_fits: Captures part of the session, but not the full cross-asset move as cleanly as the winner.

top_competing_hypotheses.thesis: Disinflationary news dominated the session, pulling yields lower and supporting only a partial risk response.
top_competing_hypotheses.weakness: Too clean to explain weaker commodities and incomplete equity relief on its own.
top_competing_hypotheses.why_it_fits: Fits the bond move, but on its own it is too clean for a session with weaker commodities and incomplete equity relief.
